languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn winces.{/n} "Yes, Nuncius, I will relay it verbatim. He says that I possess a remarkable mind and excellent practical skills, but my, ahem, 'excitability,' especially combined with my 'stubbornness to the point of ossification,' would have stunted my development were it not for his thoughtful advice and fair criticism."

languages.text: {n}Эоганн морщится.{/n} "Да, Нунциус, я передам все как есть. Он говорит, что я обладаю незаурядным умом и превосходными прикладными навыками, однако моя, кхм, "взбалмошность", поразительным образом сочетающаяся с "упрямством на грани закостенелости", сдерживала бы мое развитие, если бы не его чуткие советы и справедливая критика".

{n}Eogunn winces.{/n} "Yes, Nuncius, I will relay it verbatim. He says that I possess a remarkable mind and excellent practical skills, but my, ahem, 'excitability,' especially combined with my 'stubbornness to the point of ossification,' would have stunted my development were it not for his thoughtful advice and fair criticism."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn hace una mueca.{/n} «Sí, Nuncius, lo repetiré palabra por palabra. Dice que poseo una mente extraordinaria y habilidades prácticas excelentes, pero que mi, ejem, "entusiasmo excesivo", especialmente combinado con mi "tozudez, que roza el anquilosamiento", habría arruinado mi desarrollo de no ser por sus consejos considerados y sus razonables críticas».
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn winces.{/n} "Yes, Nuncius, I will relay it verbatim. He says that I possess a remarkable mind and excellent practical skills, but my, ahem, 'excitability,' especially combined with my 'stubbornness to the point of ossification,' would have stunted my development were it not for his thoughtful advice and fair criticism."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn hace una mueca.{/n} «Sí, Nuncius, lo repetiré palabra por palabra. Dice que poseo una mente extraordinaria y habilidades prácticas excelentes, pero que mi, ejem, "entusiasmo excesivo", especialmente combinado con mi "tozudez, que roza el anquilosamiento", habría arruinado mi desarrollo de no ser por sus consejos considerados y sus razonables críticas».

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡皱了皱眉。{/n}“好的，努恩修斯，我会一字不差地转述。他说，我虽然思维出众、动手能力也很强，但是我十分……咳咳……‘情绪化’，以及‘固执到近乎僵化’，如果没有他理性的建议和中肯的批评，我的发展早就受阻了。”
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn winces.{/n} "Yes, Nuncius, I will relay it verbatim. He says that I possess a remarkable mind and excellent practical skills, but my, ahem, 'excitability,' especially combined with my 'stubbornness to the point of ossification,' would have stunted my development were it not for his thoughtful advice and fair criticism."

traits.locale_text: {n}伊奥贡皱了皱眉。{/n}“好的，努恩修斯，我会一字不差地转述。他说，我虽然思维出众、动手能力也很强，但是我十分……咳咳……‘情绪化’，以及‘固执到近乎僵化’，如果没有他理性的建议和中肯的批评，我的发展早就受阻了。”

languages.text: {n}Eogunn grimace.{/n} « Oui, Nuncius, je vais relayer tes paroles mot pour mot. Il dit que je possède un esprit remarquable et de grands talents pratiques, mais que mon, ahem, "irritabilité", doublée d'un "entêtement pétrifiant", aurait limité mon développement sans ses conseils avisés et ses critiques constructives. »
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn winces.{/n} "Yes, Nuncius, I will relay it verbatim. He says that I possess a remarkable mind and excellent practical skills, but my, ahem, 'excitability,' especially combined with my 'stubbornness to the point of ossification,' would have stunted my development were it not for his thoughtful advice and fair criticism."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn grimace.{/n} « Oui, Nuncius, je vais relayer tes paroles mot pour mot. Il dit que je possède un esprit remarquable et de grands talents pratiques, mais que mon, ahem, "irritabilité", doublée d'un "entêtement pétrifiant", aurait limité mon développement sans ses conseils avisés et ses critiques constructives. »

languages.text: {n}Eogunn zuckt zusammen.{/n} "Ja, Nuncius, ich werde es wortgetreu wiedergeben. Er sagt, ich hätte einen bemerkenswerten Verstand und ausgezeichnete praktische Fähigkeiten, aber ohne seine durchdachten Hinweise und seine faire Kritik hätte meine, ähm, 'Erregbarkeit' in Kombination mit meiner 'an Verknöcherung grenzende Sturheit' meine Entwicklung behindert. "
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn winces.{/n} "Yes, Nuncius, I will relay it verbatim. He says that I possess a remarkable mind and excellent practical skills, but my, ahem, 'excitability,' especially combined with my 'stubbornness to the point of ossification,' would have stunted my development were it not for his thoughtful advice and fair criticism."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn zuckt zusammen.{/n} "Ja, Nuncius, ich werde es wortgetreu wiedergeben. Er sagt, ich hätte einen bemerkenswerten Verstand und ausgezeichnete praktische Fähigkeiten, aber ohne seine durchdachten Hinweise und seine faire Kritik hätte meine, ähm, 'Erregbarkeit' in Kombination mit meiner 'an Verknöcherung grenzende Sturheit' meine Entwicklung behindert. "

languages.text: {n}エオガンは顔をしかめる。{/n}「はい、ヌンキウス、そのままお伝えします。彼によれば、私は優れた頭脳と卓越した実践技術を持つが、私の…その、『興奮しやすさ』、とりわけ『骨化するほどの頑固さ』と相まって、彼の思慮深い助言と公正な批評がなければ、私の成長は妨げられていただろう、とのことだ。」
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn winces.{/n} "Yes, Nuncius, I will relay it verbatim. He says that I possess a remarkable mind and excellent practical skills, but my, ahem, 'excitability,' especially combined with my 'stubbornness to the point of ossification,' would have stunted my development were it not for his thoughtful advice and fair criticism."

traits.locale_text: {n}エオガンは顔をしかめる。{/n}「はい、ヌンキウス、そのままお伝えします。彼によれば、私は優れた頭脳と卓越した実践技術を持つが、私の…その、『興奮しやすさ』、とりわけ『骨化するほどの頑固さ』と相まって、彼の思慮深い助言と公正な批評がなければ、私の成長は妨げられていただろう、とのことだ。」

languages.text: {n}Eogunn yüzünü buruşturuyor.{/n} "Evet Nuncius, kelimesi kelimesine ileteceğim. Dikkat çekici bir zihne ve mükemmel pratik becerilere sahip olduğumu ancak... Özellikle 'katılaşma noktasına varan inatçılığımla' birleştiğinde 'heyecanlılığımın', kendisinin düşünceli tavsiyeleri ve adil eleştirileri olmasaydı gelişimimi engelleyeceğini söylüyor."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn winces.{/n} "Yes, Nuncius, I will relay it verbatim. He says that I possess a remarkable mind and excellent practical skills, but my, ahem, 'excitability,' especially combined with my 'stubbornness to the point of ossification,' would have stunted my development were it not for his thoughtful advice and fair criticism."
